channel.title: OpenAI on TechWave Hub
channel.description: Recent content in OpenAI on TechWave Hub

item.title: OpenAI & ChatGPT: The Company, the Founders, and the Story Behind the World's Most Famous AI
item.description: Who owns ChatGPT? Learn everything about OpenAI, its founders, Sam Altman, and the incredible story behind the world's most famous AI chatbot.
